zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich Von Ortenburg I於1172年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 帕斯奧奧爾波格時，他的父親Graf Rapoto von Ortenburg57歲，母親Elisabeth von Sulzbach32歲。他和Božislava Přemyslovna至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1241年2月15日在他的家鄉享年69歲。

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich Von Ortenburg I was born in 1172, in Ortenburg, Passau, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Graf Rapoto von Ortenburg, was 57 and his mother, Elisabeth von Sulzbach, was 32. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Božislava Přemyslovna. He died on 15 February 1241, in his hometown, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich Von Ortenburg I est né en 1172, à Ortenburg, Landkreis Passau, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Graf Rapoto von Ortenburg, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth von Sulzbach, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Božislava Přemyslovna. Il est décédé le 15 février 1241, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich Von Ortenburg I 1172 in Ortenburg, Landkreis Passau, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Rapoto von Ortenburg 57 und seine Mutter Elisabeth von Sulzbach 32. it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich Von Ortenburg I è nato il nel 1172 nel Ortenburg, Landkreis Passau, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Graf Rapoto von Ortenburg, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth von Sulzbach, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Božislava Přemyslovna. Morì il 15 febbraio 1241, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich Von Ortenburg Iが1172年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス プアッサウオルテンブルグで生まれた時，父Graf Rapoto von Ortenburgは57歳，母Elisabeth von Sulzbachは32歳であった。彼はBožislava Přemyslovnaとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1241年2月15日に故郷で69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich Von Ortenburg I(이)가 1172년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 파소 오텐버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Rapoto von Ortenburg(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth von Sulzbach(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Božislava Přemyslovna(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1241년 2월 15일 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich Von Ortenburg I nasceu em 1172, em Ortenburg, Landkreis Passau, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Rapoto von Ortenburg, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth von Sulzbach, tinha 32 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich Von Ortenburg I родился в 1172 г. в местности ортенбург, ландкрис пассау, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Graf Rapoto von Ortenburg было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth von Sulzbach, 32. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Božislava Přemyslovna. Он умер 15 февраля 1241 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет.
